items.title_en: Nvidia earnings live updates: Data center sales, margins and AI outlook in focus
items.title_zh: Nvidia 财报实时更新：数据中心销售额、利润率和人工智能前景成为焦点
items.desc_en: Nvidia is reporting its first-quarter results after the market closes. The conference call with analysts is scheduled for 5 p.m. ET.
items.desc_zh: 英伟达将在收盘后公布第一季度业绩。分析师电话会议定于下午 5 点举行。等。

items.title_en: U.S. crude oil falls below $100 per barrel after Trump says Iran talks in final stages
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示伊朗谈判已进入最后阶段，美国原油跌破每桶100美元
items.desc_en: Trump told reporters that the administration was in the "final stages" of negotiations with Iran, according to a pool report.
items.desc_zh: 据一份联合报告称，特朗普告诉记者，政府正处于与伊朗谈判的“最后阶段”。

items.title_en: Tesla Cybertruck driver arrested after driving into lake to use 'wade mode', police say
items.title_zh: 警方称，特斯拉赛博卡车司机因使用“涉水模式”驶入湖中而被捕
items.desc_en: Police said the vehicle was abandoned by the driver after it took on water near the shoreline of Grapevine Lake in north Texas.
items.desc_zh: 警方表示，这辆车在德克萨斯州北部格雷普韦恩湖海岸线附近进水后被司机遗弃。

items.title_en: Rosenberg: Putin enjoys Xi's Chinese welcome but heads home without pipeline deal
items.title_zh: 罗森伯格：普京受到习近平的中国欢迎，但未达成管道协议就回国
items.desc_en: Russia and China showed they were shoulder-to-shoulder on the world stage, but it became clear there are limits, says the BBC's Russia Editor.
items.desc_zh: 英国广播公司俄罗斯编辑表示，俄罗斯和中国在世界舞台上表现出并肩作战，但很明显存在局限性。

items.title_en: Final two bodies of missing Italians recovered from inside Maldives cave
items.title_zh: 马尔代夫洞穴内发现最后两具失踪意大利人尸体
items.desc_en: The two were among five Italian nationals who drowned in last week's scuba diving accident in the Maldives.
items.desc_zh: 两人是上周在马尔代夫发生的水肺潜水事故中溺水身亡的五名意大利公民之一。

items.title_en: Whale to be removed from Danish island after failed German rescue
items.title_zh: 德国救援失败后，鲸鱼将被从丹麦岛上移走
items.desc_en: Danish officials will conduct a post mortem examination on the whale, which was released into the sea from a barge more than two weeks ago.
items.desc_zh: 丹麦官员将对这头鲸鱼进行尸检，这头鲸鱼是两周前从驳船上被释放到海里的。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: United Airlines, Toll Brothers, Hasbro, Nvidia & more
items.title_zh: 中午涨幅最大的股票：联合航空、托尔兄弟、孩之宝、英伟达等
items.desc_en: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.
items.desc_zh: 以下是午盘交易中成为头条新闻的公司。

items.title_en: Far-right Israeli minister condemned for taunting handcuffed Gaza flotilla activists
items.title_zh: 以色列极右翼部长因嘲笑戴手铐的加沙船队活动人士而受到谴责
items.desc_en: France and Italy are among the countries that have criticised a video showing Itamar Ben-Gvir taunting dozens of activists detained at an Israeli port.
items.desc_zh: 法国和意大利等国批评了一段视频，该视频显示伊塔马尔·本格维尔嘲讽了被拘留在以色列港口的数十名活动人士。

items.title_en: Trump's face doesn't belong on U.S. passport, senators tell Rubio
items.title_zh: 参议员告诉卢比奥，特朗普的脸不属于美国护照
items.desc_en: The State Department announced a special edition U.S. passport that will feature President Donald Trump's likeness.
items.desc_zh: 美国国务院宣布推出特别版美国护照，其中将印有唐纳德·特朗普总统的肖像。

items.title_en: UK announces 'historic' trade deal with Gulf states in G7 first
items.title_zh: 英国首先在七国集团中宣布与海湾国家达成“历史性”贸易协议
items.desc_en: The U.K. is the first G7 country to secure a trade agreement with the GCC.
items.desc_zh: 英国是第一个与海湾合作委员会达成贸易协定的七国集团国家。

items.title_en: Murder or accident? Mystery of Mango tycoon's hiking death after son's arrest
items.title_zh: 谋杀还是意外？芒果大亨儿子被捕后徒步死亡之谜
items.desc_en: Isak Andic's son Jonathan denies involvement in the fatal fall of his father, who founded one of Europe's biggest clothing empires.
items.desc_zh: 伊萨克·安迪奇 (Isak Andic) 的儿子乔纳森 (Jonathan) 否认与他父亲的倒台有关，他的父亲创立了欧洲最大的服装帝国之一。

items.title_en: Jeff Bezos says there is ‘no truth’ to the ‘buy borrow die’ tax strategy
items.title_zh: 杰夫·贝佐斯表示“买借模具”税收策略“没有事实依据”
items.desc_en: The "buy, borrow, die" strategy refers to the practice of wealthy founders or investors borrowing against their assets and using the loan proceeds as income.
items.desc_zh: “买、借、死”策略是指富有的创始人或投资者以其资产为抵押借款并将贷款收益作为收入的做法。

items.title_en: Wendy's taps former Potbelly CEO to lead struggling burger chain
items.title_zh: Wendy's 任命 Potbelly 前首席执行官领导陷入困境的汉堡连锁店
items.desc_en: Nelson Peltz's Trian Fund Management is seeking funding to take Wendy's private, according to a Financial Times report.
items.desc_zh: 据英国《金融时报》报道，纳尔逊·佩尔茨 (Nelson Peltz) 的特里安基金管理公司 (Trian Fund Management) 正在寻求资金将 Wendy's 私有化。

items.title_en: US military jets and drones tracked near Cuba as tensions rise
items.title_zh: 随着紧张局势升级，美国军用飞机和无人机在古巴附近被追踪
items.desc_en: Tracking data shows several flights by US Navy reconnaissance jets and drones during the last week.
items.desc_zh: 跟踪数据显示，美国海军侦察机和无人机在上周进行了多次飞行。

items.title_en: This stock will be a big winner as Iran disrupts the global energy market. Investors haven't realized it yet
items.title_zh: 随着伊朗扰乱全球能源市场，这只股票将成为大赢家。投资者还没有意识到这一点
items.desc_en: Each day the Strait of Hormuz remains blocked, the likelihood grows that energy prices will remain higher for longer than many are predicting.
items.desc_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡每被封锁一天，能源价格维持高位的时间就会比许多人预测的更长。

items.title_en: Here's how Nvidia has traded each of the last 16 quarters
items.title_zh: 以下是 Nvidia 过去 16 个季度的交易情况
items.desc_en: Options pricing has overestimated the size of Nvidia's post-report swing six of the past seven quarters, and 14 of the past 20, according to Cboe LiveVol data.
items.desc_zh: 根据 Cboe LiveVol 数据，过去 7 个季度中有 6 个季度期权定价高估了 Nvidia 报告后波动的规模，过去 20 个季度中有 14 个季度期权定价高估了 Nvidia 报告后波动的规模。

items.title_en: Something very unusual is happening with Nvidia options
items.title_zh: Nvidia 选项发生了一些非常不寻常的事情
items.desc_en: Ahead of earnings, NVDA's short-dated calls are trading at a premium to puts.
items.desc_zh: 在财报公布之前，NVDA 的短期看涨期权的交易价格高于看跌期权。

items.title_en: Bezos brushes off concerns of an AI bubble: 'You shouldn't worry about it'
items.title_zh: 贝索斯消除了对人工智能泡沫的担忧：“你不应该担心它”
items.desc_en: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos shrugged off concerns of a looming AI bubble, saying the massive investments will ultimately drive the technology forward over time.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊创始人杰夫·贝索斯（Jeff Bezos）对人工智能泡沫迫在眉睫的担忧不以为然，他表示，随着时间的推移，大规模投资最终将推动该技术向前发展。

items.title_en: Two Jan. 6 police officers sue Trump to block $1.8B 'lawfare' fund
items.title_zh: 1 月 6 日，两名警察起诉特朗普，要求其冻结 1.8B 美元的“法律费用”基金
items.desc_en: The Department of Justice agreed to create the fund to settle a $10 billion lawsuit by President Trump over the leak of his tax records by an IRS employee.
items.desc_zh: 司法部同意设立该基金，以解决特朗普总统因国税局雇员泄露其税务记录而提起的 100 亿美元诉讼。

items.title_en: Authentic Brands Group expects IPO in next 12 months, founder tells CNBC
items.title_zh: Authentic Brands Group 创始人告诉 CNBC，预计将在未来 12 个月内进行 IPO
items.desc_en: Authentic Brands Group, the firm behind Reebok and Champion, is bringing in a public company veteran as its next CEO, signaling it's readying for an IPO.
items.desc_zh: 锐步 (Reebok) 和 Champion 背后的公司 Authentic Brands Group 正在聘请一位上市公司资深人士担任下一任首席执行官，这表明该公司已做好 IPO 的准备。

items.title_en: Barney Frank, architect of landmark Wall Street reforms, dies at 86
items.title_zh: 具有里程碑意义的华尔街改革的缔造者巴尼·弗兰克 (Barney Frank) 去世，享年 86 岁
items.desc_en: Frank spearheaded legislation that tightened banking regulations and consumer protections to avoid a repeat of the 2007 financial crash and Great Recession.
items.desc_zh: 弗兰克带头立法收紧银行监管和消费者保护，以避免 2007 年金融危机和大衰退重演。

items.title_en: Barney Frank: One of the first openly gay US congressmen dies aged 86
items.title_zh: 巴尼·弗兰克 (Barney Frank)：首批公开同性恋身份的美国国会议员之一去世，享年 86 岁
items.desc_en: After a decades-long career in Congress, he spent his final weeks at his home in Maine living in hospice.
items.desc_zh: 在国会度过了数十年的职业生涯后，他在缅因州的家中临终关怀中心度过了最后几周。

items.desc_zh: 南卡罗来纳州众议院通过旨在驱逐克莱伯恩的新地图《纽约时报》南卡罗来纳州重新划分选区：众议院操纵规则以快速推进不公正划分的地图民主案卷南卡罗来纳州

items.title_en: Trump's Greenland envoy faces uphill battle on mission to make 'friends'
items.title_zh: 特朗普的格陵兰特使面临交“朋友”使命的艰苦战斗
items.desc_en: Jeff Landry's visit to the territory, a semi-autonomous part of Denmark, has touched a nerve among some Greenlanders.
items.desc_zh: 杰夫·兰德里对这片丹麦半自治地区的访问触动了一些格陵兰人的神经。

items.title_en: Man who murdered teen TikTok star in Pakistan gets death sentence
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦谋杀青少年 TikTok 明星的男子被判处死刑
items.desc_en: Sana Yousaf's murder highlights a pattern of violence against women in Pakistan, activists say.
items.desc_zh: 活动人士称，萨娜·优素福的谋杀凸显了巴基斯坦针对妇女的暴力行为。

items.title_en: Trump endorses Paxton in Texas, gambling on a challenger with baggage in a crucial race
items.title_zh: 特朗普在得克萨斯州支持帕克斯顿，在一场关键的竞选中押注于一位背负包袱的挑战者
items.desc_en: Trump's move dismayed Senate Republicans, many of whom have served with the Texan for decades.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普的举动令参议院共和党人感到沮丧，他们中的许多人已经为这位德克萨斯人服务了数十年。

items.title_zh: 谷歌将推出自谷歌眼镜失败以来首款智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.
items.desc_zh: 这款眼镜将于秋季某个时候上市销售，让谷歌的人工智能产品能够与用户互动。

items.desc_zh: 我们与专家讨论了人工智能黑客带来的风险。

items.title_en: Thailand cuts visa-free stay period for more than 90 countries including UK
items.title_zh: 泰国缩短英国等90多个国家的免签停留期限
items.desc_en: Many visitors who have been exempt for 60 days will soon have to apply for a visa after 30 days.
items.desc_zh: 许多已经获得 60 天豁免的游客很快就必须在 30 天后申请签证。

items.title_en: Zoe Kleinman: Why the AI industry is the real winner of the Musk-Altman trial
items.title_zh: Zoe Kleinman：为什么人工智能行业是马斯克-奥特曼试验的真正赢家
items.desc_en: The trial in Oakland, California has helped lift the veil on the AI sector - and the huge egos of the men at the heart of it.
items.desc_zh: 加利福尼亚州奥克兰的试验揭开了人工智能领域的面纱，以及该领域核心人物的巨大自负。

items.title_en: Robo-top: The machines that could make your next t-shirt
items.title_zh: Robo-top：可以为你制作下一件 T 恤的机器
items.desc_en: Most clothes are made in Asia, but new machines could bring some of that work back to the West.
items.desc_zh: 大多数衣服都是在亚洲制造的，但新机器可以将部分工作带回西方。

items.title_en: Satellites and AI used to track UK hedgehogs in bid to slow decline
items.title_zh: 卫星和人工智能用于追踪英国刺猬以减缓其数量下降
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the project will also help to identify barriers preventing hedgehogs from finding food and mates in the wild.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望该项目还能帮助找出刺猬在野外寻找食物和交配的障碍。

items.title_en: Elon Musk just lost another lawsuit. Will he keep fighting?
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克刚刚又输掉了另一场官司。他会继续战斗吗？
items.desc_en: Musk's loss against OpenAI is the latest in a string of courtroom defeats.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克输给 OpenAI 是一系列法庭失败中的最新一起。

items.title_en: Jury tosses Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and its boss Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 陪审团驳回埃隆·马斯克对 OpenAI 及其老板萨姆·奥尔特曼的诉讼
items.desc_en: Jurors spent nearly a month hearing and viewing evidence in the high-profile trial, where Musk had accused Altman of "stealing a charity".
items.desc_zh: 陪审员们花了近一个月的时间在这场备受瞩目的审判中听取和查看证据，马斯克在审判中指控奥特曼“窃取慈善机构”。

items.title_en: Instant AI answers can trivialise human intelligence, warns Royal Observatory
items.title_zh: 皇家天文台警告说，即时人工智能答案可能会削弱人类智能
items.desc_en: Paddy Rodgers said the Observatory's rich history showed the power of human knowledge and the need to avoid "dependence" on AI.
items.desc_zh: 帕迪·罗杰斯表示，天文台丰富的历史表明了人类知识的力量以及避免“依赖”人工智能的必要性。

items.title_en: Chromtuner
items.title_zh: Chromtuner
items.desc_en: A chromatic tuner for macOS. ±1¢ accuracy
items.desc_zh: 适用于 macOS 的半音调音器。 ±1美分精度

items.title_en: Retina
items.title_zh: Retina
items.desc_en: Screen recorder w/ auto-zoom, smooth cursors, + AI graphics
items.desc_zh: 具有自动缩放、平滑光标和 AI 图形功能的屏幕录像机

items.title_en: X pledges quicker action on hate and terror content in the UK
items.title_zh: X 承诺对英国的仇恨和恐怖内容采取更快的行动
items.desc_en: Ofcom said the commitments were of particular importance after recent crimes targeting Jewish communities in the UK.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，在英国最近发生针对犹太社区的犯罪事件后，这些承诺尤为重要。

items.title_en: Claim, counter-claim and tech's seedy side exposed: Five things we learned in the Musk-Altman trial
items.title_zh: 索赔、反索赔和科技的肮脏一面暴露：我们在马斯克-奥特曼审判中学到的五件事
items.desc_en: As the jury deliberates, this is what we found out during the weeks-long trial with two tech titans at its heart.
items.desc_zh: 正如陪审团审议的那样，这是我们在以两位科技巨头为核心的长达数周的审判中发现的结果。

items.title_en: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
items.title_zh: 走进兰花育种的秘密和利润丰厚的世界
items.desc_en: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.
items.desc_zh: 将新兰花推向市场可能需要十年的时间，因此育种者对其高科技流程保密。

items.title_en: AI could put people off tech jobs and hurt the economy, warns Raspberry Pi boss
items.title_zh: Raspberry Pi 老板警告说，人工智能可能会让人们失业并损害经济
items.desc_en: Eben Upton warns against claims that Artificial Intelligence will destroy vast numbers of computing roles over the coming years.
items.desc_zh: 埃本·厄普顿 (Eben Upton) 对人工智能将在未来几年摧毁大量计算角色的说法提出警告。

items.title_en: 'Millions' of pounds saved by replacing Palantir tech in refugee system
items.title_zh: 通过在难民系统中更换 Palantir 技术节省了“数百万英镑”
items.desc_en: The government said its in-house IT system was "more flexible" while meeting "high standards" of security.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，其内部IT系统“更加灵活”，同时满足“高标准”的安全性。

items.desc_zh: 摇摇欲坠的道路和其他危险——人工智能能让我们的街道更安全吗？
